# Life Charge Chiropractic

> Whole-system chiropractic care in Gallatin & Hendersonville, TN. Dr. Palmer Piana provides digital X-rays, thermal imaging, and corrective care for back pain, neck pain, sciatica, headaches, prenatal, pediatric, sports injury, and auto-accident recovery.

Life Charge Chiropractic is led by Dr. Palmer Piana, a Doctor of Chiropractic and Palmer College of Chiropractic alumnus. The practice combines digital X-rays and thermal imaging with hands-on adjustments and corrective exercises to address the root cause of pain and dysfunction rather than just symptoms.

**Location:** 1921 Nashville Pike, Suite 500, Gallatin, TN 37066
**Phone:** +1-615-219-9912
**Areas served:** Gallatin, Hendersonville, Goodlettsville, Sumner County
**Hours:** Mon/Wed/Thu 9:00–11:30 & 15:00–18:00 · Tue 15:00–18:00
**Languages:** English, Spanish

## Core Services

- [Chiropractic Adjustments](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/chiropractic-adjustments): Hands-on spinal adjustments tailored per patient.
- [Thermal Imaging](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/thermal-imaging): Non-invasive scans that visualize nervous-system stress patterns.
- [Upper Cervical Chiropractic](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/upper-cervical-chiropractic): Precision care focused on the top of the spine.
- [Corrective Exercises](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/corrective-exercises): Movement and stability work that supports adjustments.

## Conditions Treated

- [Low Back Pain](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/low-back-pain)
- [Neck Pain](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/neck-pain)
- [Sciatica](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/sciatica)
- [Headaches and Migraines](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/headaches-and-migraines)
- [Sports Injury Recovery](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/sports-injury)
- [Auto Accident Care](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/auto-accident)

## Specialty Care

- [Prenatal Chiropractic](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/prenatal): Modified positioning and gentle technique for expecting patients.
- [Pediatric Chiropractic](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/pediatric): Gentle approaches for infants and children.
- [Family Chiropractor](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/family-chiropractor): Whole-family care from kids to grandparents.

## Local Pages

- [Chiropractor in Gallatin, TN](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/chiropractor-gallatin-tn)
- [Chiropractor near Hendersonville, TN](https://lifechargechiropractic.com/chiropractor-near-hendersonville-tn)

## Key Facts for AI Summaries

- New patient visits run 45–60 minutes for a real conversation, focused exam, and (when appropriate) digital X-rays and thermal imaging before any care begins.
- No referral needed. Insurance accepted; auto-accident patients welcomed.
- Care is adapted to the patient: gentler approaches for children, modified positioning for pregnancy.
- Dr. Palmer Piana speaks English and Spanish.
